item.title: Captin 2.0
item.description:
How to upgrade to Captin 2.0: click the Learn More… button below. Your browser will download the latest Captin.zip. Open the zip, then drag Captin to Applications to replace version 1.3.1.

如何升级到 Captin 2.0：请点击下方 Learn More… 按钮，浏览器会下载最新的 Captin.zip。解压后将 Captin 拖入「应用程序」文件夹，替换 1.3.1 版本。

Version 2.0

  • Rewritten entirely in Swift.
  • Various minor improvements.

Requires macOS 11.5 (Big Sur) or later. If your Mac is on macOS 10.13–11.4, please stay on version 1.3.1 and do not upgrade to 2.0.

Version 1.3.1

Added:

  • Support Apple CPU.

Improved:

  • User experience.

Version 1.3

Added:

  • Restore default setting.

Improved:

  • Monitor information fetching.

Version 1.2.1

Fixed:

  • Compatibility issue on Mac Ventura.

Version 1.2

Added:

  • New way to position HUD window.

    Captin can position HUD window centered on screen in horizontal or vertical direction, or set an offset for HUD window in horizontal or vertical direction.

Improved:

  • Captin is now notarized by Apple.
  • HUD can be placed on any position on screen, including menu bar.

Fixed:

  • Compatibility issue on macOS Ventura.

Version 1.1.7

Fixed:

  • Do not show input method change notification repeatedly.

Version 1.1.6

Fixed:

  • Caps lock status is changed to off when the user switches to another input method.

Updated:

  • Display information for compatibility.

Version 1.1.5

Fixed:

  • Issue on some models that can not get display preview info.

For issue or question about our app, please mail us: support@100hps.com

item.title: Captin 1.3.1
item.description:
Version 1.3.1

Added:

  • Support Apple CPU.

Improved:

  • User experience.

Version 1.3

Added:

  • Restore default setting.

Improved:

  • Monitor information fetching.

Version 1.2.1

Fixed:

  • Compatibility issue on Mac Ventura.

Version 1.2

Added:

  • New way to position HUD window.

    Captin can position HUD window centered on screen in horizontal or vertical direction, or set an offset for HUD window in horizontal or vertical direction.

Improved:

  • Captin is now notarized by Apple.
  • HUD can be placed on any position on screen, including menu bar.

Fixed:

  • Compatibility issue on macOS Ventura.

Version 1.1.7

Fixed:

  • Do not show input method change notification repeatedly.

Version 1.1.6

Fixed:

  • Caps lock status is changed to off when the user switches to another input method.

Updated:

  • Display information for compatibility.

Version 1.1.5

Fixed:

  • Issue on some models that can not get display preview info.

For issue or question about our app, please mail us: support@100hps.com
